CurrentIssues.ID: ArgumentListWrapping:EverydayCatalog.kt:( "Mercury" to 0.2408467, "Venus" to 0.61519726, "Earth" to 1.0, "Mars" to 1.8808158, "Jupiter" to 11.862615, "Saturn" to 29.447498, "Uranus" to 84.016846, "Neptune" to 164.79132, )
ArgumentListWrapping:EverydayCatalog.kt:( id = "c", name = "Celsius", symbol = "°C", toBase = { it + 273.15 }, fromBase = { it - 273.15 }, )
ArgumentListWrapping:EverydayCatalog.kt:( id = "cm", name = "Centimetres", symbol = "cm", toBase = { it }, fromBase = { it } )
ArgumentListWrapping:EverydayCatalog.kt:( id = "eu", name = "EU", symbol = "EU", toBase = { (it - 2.0) / 1.5 }, fromBase = { it * 1.5 + 2.0 } )
ArgumentListWrapping:EverydayCatalog.kt:( id = "f", name = "Fahrenheit", symbol = "°F", toBase = { (it + 459.67) * 5.0 / 9.0 }, fromBase = { it * 9.0 / 5.0 - 459.67 }, )

ArgumentListWrapping:EverydayCatalog.kt:( id = "gas", name = "Gas Mark", symbol = "Gas", toBase = { val f = it * 25.0 + 250.0; (f + 459.67) * 5.0 / 9.0 }, fromBase = { val f = it * 9.0 / 5.0 - 459.67; (f - 250.0) / 25.0 }, )
ArgumentListWrapping:EverydayCatalog.kt:( id = "jp", name = "Japan (cm)", symbol = "JP", toBase = { it }, fromBase = { it } )

ArgumentListWrapping:EverydayCatalog.kt:( id = "kmh", name = "Kilometres per hour", symbol = "km/h", toBase = { if (it == 0.0) Double.POSITIVE_INFINITY else 60.0 / it }, fromBase = { if (it == 0.0) Double.POSITIVE_INFINITY else 60.0 / it } )
ArgumentListWrapping:EverydayCatalog.kt:( id = "min-km", name = "Minutes per km", symbol = "min/km", toBase = { it }, fromBase = { it } )
ArgumentListWrapping:EverydayCatalog.kt:( id = "min-mi", name = "Minutes per mile", symbol = "min/mi", toBase = { it / 1.609344 }, fromBase = { it * 1.609344 } )

ArgumentListWrapping:EverydayCatalog.kt:( id = "mph", name = "Miles per hour", symbol = "mph", toBase = { if (it == 0.0) Double.POSITIVE_INFINITY else 60.0 / (it * 1.609344) }, fromBase = { if (it == 0.0) Double.POSITIVE_INFINITY else 60.0 / (it * 1.609344) } )
ArgumentListWrapping:EverydayCatalog.kt:( id = "uk-m", name = "UK Men", symbol = "UK ♂", toBase = { (it + 23.0) / 3.0 * 2.54 }, fromBase = { it / 2.54 * 3.0 - 23.0 } )
ArgumentListWrapping:EverydayCatalog.kt:( id = "uk-w", name = "UK Women", symbol = "UK ♀", toBase = { (it + 21.5) / 3.0 * 2.54 }, fromBase = { it / 2.54 * 3.0 - 21.5 } )
ArgumentListWrapping:EverydayCatalog.kt:( id = "us-m", name = "US Men", symbol = "US ♂", toBase = { (it + 22.0) / 3.0 * 2.54 }, fromBase = { it / 2.54 * 3.0 - 22.0 } )
ArgumentListWrapping:EverydayCatalog.kt:( id = "us-w", name = "US Women", symbol = "US ♀", toBase = { (it + 20.5) / 3.0 * 2.54 }, fromBase = { it / 2.54 * 3.0 - 20.5 } )
ArgumentListWrapping:MeasurementCatalog.kt:( id = "c", name = "Celsius", symbol = "°C", toBase = { it + 273.15 }, fromBase = { it - 273.15 }, )
ArgumentListWrapping:MeasurementCatalog.kt:( id = "f", name = "Fahrenheit", symbol = "°F", toBase = { (it + 459.67) * 5.0 / 9.0 }, fromBase = { it * 9.0 / 5.0 - 459.67 }, )
ArgumentListWrapping:MeasurementCatalog.kt:( id = "k", name = "Kelvin", symbol = "K", toBase = { it }, fromBase = { it }, )
ArgumentListWrapping:MeasurementCatalog.kt:( id = "kmpl", name = "Kilometre per litre", symbol = "km/L", toBase = { it }, fromBase = { it }, )

ArgumentListWrapping:MeasurementCatalog.kt:( id = "lp100km", name = "Litre per 100 km", symbol = "L/100km", toBase = { if (it == 0.0) Double.POSITIVE_INFINITY else 100.0 / it }, fromBase = { if (it == 0.0) Double.POSITIVE_INFINITY else 100.0 / it }, )
ArgumentListWrapping:MeasurementCatalog.kt:( id = "r", name = "Rankine", symbol = "°R", toBase = { it * 5.0 / 9.0 }, fromBase = { it * 9.0 / 5.0 }, )
Kdoc:Formatting.kt:/** Multiplatform replacements for the JVM `String.format` patterns used across catalogs. */
